concepts.label: AI Commoditization

concepts.label: Problem Stack Elevation
concepts.description: Moving humans to higher-level problems while AI handles lower levels

concepts.description: Human-like interfaces that drive behavior change through social dynamics

concepts.description: The degradation of meaningful information in systems over time or through noise

concepts.description: What makes evaluation signals trustworthy and meaningful

concepts.description: Intentional effort barriers that separate high-quality from low-quality actors

concepts.label: Narrative Identity
concepts.description: Professional identity as constructed through stories rather than documents

concepts.description: Systems of relationship-based credibility and referral

concepts.label: Self-Knowledge
concepts.description: The importance of deep self-understanding for professional effectiveness

concepts.label: Moonshot Growth
concepts.description: The developmental value of high-risk, high-ambition endeavors

concepts.label: Platform Shift
concepts.description: Transitions in how platforms create and capture value

concepts.label: Career Mobility Distance
concepts.description: The measurable gap between current position and target role

concepts.description: Long-term growth through intentional underperformance

concepts.label: Orchestration
concepts.description: Achieving complex outcomes through coordination of simpler components

concepts.description: Hiring as optimization across skill bundles rather than linear ranking

concepts.description: How parallel institutions emerge from historical exclusion

concepts.label: Minimum Viable Existence
concepts.description: The declining accessibility of stable middle-class life
